query:
SELECT s.id, s.conversionId, s.pageNum, LENGTH(s.htmlContent) as htmlLen, 
       LEFT(s.htmlContent, 300) as htmlPreview
FROM slides s
JOIN conversions c ON s.conversionId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'done'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC, s.pageNum ASC
LIMIT 30;

       LEFT(s.htmlContent, 300) as htmlPreview
FROM slides s
JOIN conversions c ON s.conversionId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'done'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC, s.pageNum ASC
LIMIT 30;
